pip_2026-07-18.mp4.title: Pip vs. a GIANT Sour Gummy! 🍬
pip_2026-07-18.mp4.description:
Experiment Log #7180: Happy National Sour Candy Day! I found the sourest, sparkliest rainbow gummy belt for the Mystical Press. Will it be sweet or will it be sour? 🌈 My whiskers are tingling with excitement! What experiment should I try for my next video? Let me know your ideas! 🤩 Pip-pip!

#PipsProjects #NationalSourCandyDay #SourCandy #ASMR #Satisfying #Gummy #Cute #Animation
